recommendations.title: Mischief Night
recommendations.overview: Young Emily Walton, who has suffered from psychosomatic blindness ever since the car accident that took her mother's life, must summon every instinct at her disposal to protect herself and her loved ones from a intruder.

recommendations.title: 100 Degrees Below Zero
recommendations.overview: After freak climate and weather events destroy the world around them, a group of rogue scientists attempt to reverse the deadly new ice age.

recommendations.title: The Man from Earth
recommendations.overview: A departing professor gathers his closest colleagues for an intimate farewell, but the night takes an unexpected turn when he shares a stunning secret about his past. As the conversation unfolds, skepticism and curiosity collide, challenging everythi

recommendations.title: The Man from Earth: Holocene
recommendations.overview: 14,000-year-old "Man from Earth" John Oldman, now teaching in northern California, realizes that not only is he finally starting to age, but four students have discovered his deepest secret, putting his life in grave danger and potentially destroying

recommendations.title: I Spit on Your Grave III: Vengeance Is Mine
recommendations.overview: Jennifer Hills is still tormented by the brutal sexual assault she endured years ago. She’s changed identities and cities, reluctantly joining a support group where she begins to piece together a new life. But when her new friend’s murderer goes free

recommendations.title: The Witcher: Nightmare of the Wolf
recommendations.overview: Escaping from poverty to become a witcher, Vesemir slays monsters for coin and glory, but when a new menace rises, he must face the demons of his past.

recommendations.title: The Old Guard 2
recommendations.overview: Andy and her team of immortal warriors fight with renewed purpose as they face a powerful new foe threatening their mission to protect humanity.

recommendations.title: Jesus Christ Vampire Hunter
recommendations.overview: The second coming is upon us, and Jesus has returned to earth. But before he can get down to the serious business of judging the living and the dead, he has to contend with an army of vampires that can walk in the daylight.

recommendations.title: The Conspirator
recommendations.overview: Mary Surratt is the lone female charged as a co-conspirator in the assassination trial of Abraham Lincoln. As the whole nation turns against her, she is forced to rely on her reluctant lawyer to uncover the truth and save her life.

recommendations.title: Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S.
recommendations.overview: Mothra and her fairies return to Japan to warn mankind that they must return Kiryu to the sea, for the dead must not be disturbed. However Godzilla has survived to menace Japan leaving Kiryu as the nation's only defense.
